notes: SHIP v1.14.258 — SITE-PROFILE CLASSIFIER FIX (EDIT C micro-ship from HANDOFF-INSPECT3D-TRAY-FIDELITY.md; 'own stamp, own verify' per the handoff). ONE edit, dct-ios.html only, in site_derivePlatformsFromMaster (~L22612). BUG: role derivation typed platforms via the EDP/CSV-path classifier (deploy_extractGpuType / deploy_classifyDevice / deploy_inferDeviceRole), which does NOT recognise the sn2201/sn3420/cm8148/om-family switches — so the Site Profile listed them as OTHER even though master_hostType (the MASTER-path classifier, .247+) already types them 'sw'. FIX: `var _mt = _TMAP[master_hostType({ model: model })] || 'unknown'; var role = (_mt === 'unknown') ? 'other' : _mt;` — master_hostType reads .model (verified L29416; dns simply empty here), returns the raw code, _TMAP (module-scope since .255) maps it to the display role (gpu/switch/pdu/storage/server/patch/media), and we fall back to 'other' ONLY when that yields 'unknown' — exactly the handoff spec. This is the SAME classifier the 3D rack + FLAT elevation type against, so the Site Profile now agrees with them (one source of truth for hostType across all three surfaces). SCOPE: this micro-ship ONLY fixes the classifier path; the larger Site-Profile redesign (running list, no poison pill, no fake deletes — John's 2026-07-14 rulings) stays in Ship-2's spec, untouched here. The EDP-path helpers (deploy_extractGpuType/classifyDevice/inferDeviceRole) are unchanged and keep their other callers — no dead code. Gates: node --check 4 inline blocks + sw.js PASS; CRLF preserved (bare-LF 0); NO CSS touched (brace balance unchanged); three-stamp lockstep .257->.258. ?legacy=1 BYTE-IDENTICAL: site_derivePlatformsFromMaster runs on Master load/restore regardless of redesign, but its inputs/outputs are classifier-internal (role string on a derived platform record) — no legacy markup, showPage, or render path touched; the only behavioural change is switch families now type SWITCH instead of OTHER, which is the fix. NOTE: this is an independent surface from the .251-.257 3D-rack batch — different code path, own device-verify. DEVICE-VERIFY (John, iPhone): [1] Load a Master with sn/cm/om switches -> Site Profile -> platforms show SWITCH (not OTHER) for those families; GPU families still GPU; user-entered platforms still win (source!=='master' short-circuit unchanged). [2] Existing profiles with only master-derived platforms re-derive correctly on next Master load (idempotent write guard unchanged). BATCH: the 3D-rack batch (.251-.257) remains owed a consolidated device pass; this .258 micro-ship is a SEPARATE surface with its own one-line verify. STILL OWED — JOHN'S RULING (unchanged): DFW02 empty-model row @c1:001:38; heights for gpu-b40-02/cpu-gp2-*/inf-med-01/om2216-c14/fs-media-converter-chassis/VAST DBox/net-ufm-05; whether .252 magenta reads too loud; the FLAT-elevation EDP-vocabulary colour bug (own ship).
